data.title: 国际服活动 Story Recruitment
data.summary: [Story Recruitment Event] Time spent with Sensei sure does fly by! If you have any special memories
data.body:
[Story Recruitment Event]

Time spent with Sensei sure does fly by!
If you have any special memories or scenes that made a deep impression on you in Blue Archive, please let us know!
We will give a gift to the Sensei whose story is chosen!

#BlueArchive

▶ Participation Period: 10/14 (Fri) – 10/17 (Mon)
Send your Story: https://forms.gle/NmCei35MdUHExLTi7![dhiQRd2u4dXxc6KQhsS5D50xvlCHqkU1.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/dhiQRd2u4dXxc6KQhsS5D50xvlCHqkU1.jpg)
